data.title: WeRide to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Wednesday, May 13, 2026
data.description: On April 30, 2026, WeRide Inc. ('WeRide' or the 'Company') disclosed that it will unveil its unaudited financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on May 13, 2026, ahead of the U.S. markets' opening. WeRide, known for its autonomous driving technology, will make these results public. The company's stocks are listed on Nasdaq under the symbol WRD and on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange as 0800.

data.title: Google 'Proudly' Defends Pentagon AI Ties Amid Internal Backlash: Report
data.description: Alphabet Inc., the parent company of Google, has stated its commitment to working with the U.S. military, despite facing criticism internally. Kent Walker, Alphabet's President of Global Affairs, addressed employees in a memo, emphasizing Google's long-standing support for defense agencies. He mentioned that the company supports military uses of AI responsibly, excluding applications for domestic mass surveillance or autonomous weapons without human oversight. Walker defended this position by noting Google's involvement in classified government projects such as cybersecurity and veterans' healthcare. The company's stance aligns with other major AI labs. Alphabet did not respond immediately to Benzinga's request for comments. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Soho Square Agrees Exit of Investment in CreateFuture Following Period of Strong Growth
data.description: Soho Square Capital has recently finalized an exit from their investment in CreateFuture, which comes after a period of significant growth for the company. This strategic move showcases the success of their partnership and marks an important milestone for both parties involved. The numbers reveal a substantial increase in CreateFuture's value, reflecting the successful collaboration and positive outcomes achieved during the partnership between Soho Square Capital and CreateFuture.
